title: Orchestration Scorecard (v1)
description: Merged view of the current session's backend mix (from the ledger) and lifetime totals (from the accumulator), produced by scripts/orchestration-scorecard.sh. Claude is the host runtime and is never counted as a delegation; the headline figures are worker delegation counts. See spec.md 'Orchestration Visibility Contract'.

observed.description: False when no counted delegation exists in either scope; surfaces degrade to 'no delegations observed'.

status.description: Claude is the host runtime; its work is not delegation-counted.

backends_engaged.description: Distinct backends active this session, including the Claude host (1) plus worker when used.

non_claude_delegations.description: Cumulative worker delegations across rolled-up sessions.

note.description: One-line reading aid for the figures.

status.description: used = count>0; available = configured but unused this session; not-configured = backend binary absent (neutral, not a failure).
